headline: Full stack live — 16 articles, a podcast, and 13 channels posting 7 days a week.
read: We went from three channels to the full stack. We're now syndicating 16 SEO/AEO articles across 13 connected channels — Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, Blogger, Tumblr, Telegraph, GitHub Pages, Bluesky, Mastodon, Threads, Telegram, Pinterest, plus LinkedIn via Buffer — and every channel gets unique, native copy instead of the same blurb. Facebook now posts 7 days a week and Reels run 4x/week. We also launched a podcast, 'Get Booked, Not F***ed', live on Spotify with a self-hosted RSS feed that fans out to the rest; 3 episodes are up and the vertical promo clips are wired into the social queues. Everything's still warming up, so audience numbers stay small for a few weeks — the win is that every channel is now fed with quality native content and the engagement daemons surface real ICP conversations daily.
next_move: Volume + the first real performance read. Keep the 7-day Facebook cadence and 4x/week Reels rolling, let the 16-article cluster keep fanning out across every blogging account, push the podcast (submit to Apple once their bug clears + the indie directories from the checklist), and keep mining FB/Reddit for real contractor quotes for phase-2 EEAT. First hard read comes from the Monday report — then double down on whatever archetype lands first.
